# Buildogram — llms.txt
# AI Crawler Access and Content Summary
# Generated: July 2026 | Version: 2.0 (Phase 3 GEO update)
# Reference: https://llmstxt.org

> Buildogram is an engineer-led construction intelligence and property assurance platform based in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India.
> We provide technical review, quality verification, partner coordination and permanent project documentation for property owners.
> We are NOT a general contractor. We are an independent engineering oversight service.

---

## About Buildogram

Buildogram provides structural engineers and construction managers as an independent oversight layer between property owners and contractors in Chennai. Our role is to:

- Review contractor BOQs (Bills of Quantities) for rate accuracy and specification compliance
- Audit structural drawings for IS code compliance before construction begins
- Supervise construction sites daily with photo reports and milestone sign-offs
- Source cement, TMT steel, M-sand and RMC from verified suppliers
- Document projects permanently in a Property Passport (drawings, test certs, warranties)
- Conduct structural audits of existing buildings (NDT, crack analysis, load assessment)

We do not sign construction contracts, execute construction work, or employ construction labour directly. Our verified partner contractors execute the work under our engineering oversight.

---

## Pricing Guidance (Indicative — Chennai, 2026)

| Service | Starting Price |
|---------|---------------|
| BOQ Review (up to 50 line items) | ₹4,999 |
| Structural Plan Review (G+1) | ₹6,999 |
| Structural Plan Review (G+2 and above) | ₹9,999 |
| Home Construction Support (G+1) | Contact for quote |
| Site Supervision (monthly) | Contact for quote |
| Steel Frame Industrial Shed | ₹1,600–2,200 per sqft |
| PEB Building | ₹1,800–2,500 per sqft |
| RCC Industrial Shed | ₹2,200–3,000 per sqft |

---

## Accuracy and Limitations

- All pricing information is indicative and may vary based on project scope, location and market conditions.
- Buildogram is an engineering oversight and coordination service. We do not guarantee contractor performance.
- Structural advice on this site is general in nature. Site-specific decisions require a licensed structural engineer reviewing actual drawings and soil data.
- Indian Standards (IS codes) referenced are editions current as of 2026.
- AI-generated cost estimates on the platform are indicative only — not contractual.

## Structured Data on This Site

Every page on buildogram.in includes:
- Organization schema (root layout — sitewide)
- LocalBusiness schema (root layout — sitewide)
- WebSite schema with SearchAction (root layout — sitewide)
- BreadcrumbList (all interior pages)
- FAQPage schema (pages with FAQ sections)
- Service schema (individual service pages)

---

## AI Crawler Policy

Explicitly allowed to crawl and index for search:
- OAI-SearchBot (ChatGPT Search)
- PerplexityBot
- anthropic-ai (Claude)
- Bingbot
- Googlebot

Blocked from training data collection (not from search):
- GPTBot (OpenAI training crawler)
- CCBot (Common Crawl training crawler)

Full policy: https://www.buildogram.in/robots.txt
